contact.address: 139 Ayres Rd, Old Trafford, Stretford, Manchester M16 9WR

sample_reviews.author: James R.
sample_reviews.text: Really helpful local shop — had everything I needed for my bathroom repair and the staff gave great advice. Prices are fair and the service is friendly.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M.
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant little shop in Old Trafford. Popped in for some plumbing fittings and they had exactly what I needed. Much better than driving to a big DIY chain.

sample_reviews.author: Dave T.
sample_reviews.text: As a local plumber I use Trafford Plumbing & DIY regularly. The stock is always well kept and they know their stuff. Reliable and quick — exactly what a trade needs.

brand.usp: Trafford Plumbing & DIY is Old Trafford's go-to destination for plumbing supplies and DIY essentials, offering expert advice and quality products for both trade professionals and home improvers.
brand.hero_headline: Manchester's Trusted Local Plumbing & DIY Store
brand.about_paragraph: We're Trafford Plumbing & DIY, proudly serving Old Trafford and the wider Manchester area from our store on Ayres Road. Whether you're a seasoned tradesperson stocking up on plumbing supplies or a homeowner tackling a weekend project, we've got the products and the know-how to help you get the job done right. Pop in and see us — we're always happy to offer advice and find the right solution for your needs.
